title: Bengal elections second phase: Mamata, her Cabinet colleagues face contest in Kolkata and its suburbs
description: Of the remaining 142 seats that are going to polls in the second phase, 111 seats are located in the Presidency region of the State; the Trinamool Congress had won 96 seats and the BJP 14 seats in the 2021 Assembly polls; Kolkata and the adjoining areas have voted for the Trinamool Congress across several elections in the past, but this time the candidates of the ruling party are facing tough contests from the candidates of BJP and Left Front
